title: Paula's seafood ring

html:
Paula's Seafood Ring

Ingredients

  • 1 tin salmon or tuna
  • 1 tin smoked mussels, drained
  • 8 eggs, boiled
  • 240 ml good mayonnaise
  • 1 tub crumbled cottage cheese
  • 200 ml grated cheddar cheese
  • 30 ml grated onion
  • 125 ml finely chopped parsley
  • 1 box Bacon Kips, crumbled

 

Method

Use a Tupperware ring. The dish consists of 3 layers. Bacon Kips go between each layer.

  1. Layer 1: Boil the eggs and grate them. Mix with 60 ml mayo and salt and pepper.
  2. Layer 2: Tin of tuna/salmon mixed with grated onion, parsley, 100 ml grated cheese and 120 ml mayo
  3. Layer 3: Cottage cheese mixed with 100 ml grated cheese and 60 ml mayo

 

  • Pack the mussels into the bottom of your ring. Sprinkle Bacon Kips over
  • Spoon in the egg mixture next. Sprinkle Bacon Kips over
  • Spoon in the tuna mixture. Sprinkle Bacon Kips over
  • Spoon in the cottage cheese mixture and sprinkle Bacon Kips over

 

Must sit in the fridge overnight.

 

Garnish with greenery and serve with a slice of melba toast (buy at Woollies)
